message:
feat(airtable): add list_tables, get_table, list_fields discovery operations with schema cache

Introduces three new read-only schema discovery operations that let agents
resolve stable table IDs and field IDs before CRUD, surviving renames.
Backed by a 5-minute in-memory schema cache to coalesce redundant
get_base_schema API calls. Includes ambiguity detection for duplicate
table/field names with clear error messages guiding callers to use stable
IDs. Manifest updated with full FCP2 operation specs and recomputed
interface hash. Four integration tests cover happy paths, ambiguity
rejection, field resolution, and cache reuse.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:4dfbb8acff98b7c148e34376d45de580ecfc16a9885ab362dafa5310274e113a"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:fb9abca921750747090944398a3fd1a118989224e6aa8f9abfc88c2586535ab1"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.airtable"
@@ -405,6 +405,204 @@ related = [
     "airtable.list_records",
 ]
 
+[provides.operations.list_tables]
+description = "List tables in an Airtable base with stable IDs and summary metadata"
+capability = "airtable.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.input_schema]
+required = ["base_id"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.input_schema.properties.base_id]
+description = "Airtable base ID (starts with 'app')"
+pattern = "^app[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.output_schema]
+required = ["tables"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.output_schema.properties.tables]
+description = "List of tables with id, name, primaryFieldId, fieldCount, and viewCount"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.airtable.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations.list_tables.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Discover stable table IDs before reading or writing records."
+common_mistakes = ["Using guessed table names instead of discovering table IDs first."]
+examples = ['{"base_id": "appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"}']
+related = [
+    "airtable.get_base_schema",
+    "airtable.get_table",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.get_table]
+description = "Get one Airtable table schema by stable table ID or exact table name"
+capability = "airtable.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.input_schema]
+required = [
+    "base_id",
+    "table_ref",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.input_schema.properties.base_id]
+description = "Airtable base ID (starts with 'app')"
+pattern = "^app[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.input_schema.properties.table_ref]
+description = "Table ID (tbl...) or exact table name"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.output_schema]
+required = ["table"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.output_schema.properties.table]
+description = "Resolved table definition including fields and views"
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.airtable.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations.get_table.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Inspect one table schema before constructing field-safe record operations."
+common_mistakes = ["Using non-exact table names that collide with multiple tables."]
+examples = [
+    '{"base_id": "appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX", "table_ref": "tblXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"}',
+    '{"base_id": "appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX", "table_ref": "Tasks"}',
+]
+related = [
+    "airtable.list_tables",
+    "airtable.list_fields",
+]
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields]
+description = "List or resolve fields in one table using field IDs or exact field names"
+capability = "airtable.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.rate_limit]
+max = 100
+per_ms = 60000
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.input_schema]
+required = [
+    "base_id",
+    "table_ref",
+]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.input_schema.properties.base_id]
+description = "Airtable base ID (starts with 'app')"
+pattern = "^app[a-zA-Z0-9]+$"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.input_schema.properties.table_ref]
+description = "Table ID (tbl...) or exact table name"
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.input_schema.properties.field_refs]
+description = "Optional list of field IDs/names to resolve; rejects ambiguous names"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.input_schema.properties.field_refs.items]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.output_schema]
+required = ["fields"]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.output_schema.properties.fields]
+description = "Resolved field definitions with stable id and human-readable name"
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["api.airtable.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+ip_allow = []
+cidr_deny = []
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+spki_pins = []
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 5
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 30000
+max_response_bytes = 2097152
+
+[provides.operations.list_fields.ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Resolve stable field IDs before CRUD so workflows survive field renames."
+common_mistakes = [
+    "Using only field names and ignoring stable field IDs.",
+    "Passing ambiguous duplicate field names.",
+]
+examples = [
+    '{"base_id": "appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX", "table_ref": "Tasks"}',
+    '{"base_id": "appXXXXXXXXXXXXXX", "table_ref": "tblXXXXXXXXXXXXXX", "field_refs": ["fldABC", "Status"]}',
+]
+related = [
+    "airtable.get_table",
+    "airtable.get_base_schema",
+]
+
 [provides.operations.get_record]
 description = "Get a single record by ID from an Airtable table"
 capability = "airtable.read"
@@ -863,6 +1061,9 @@ create_record = ["airtable.write"]
 update_record = ["airtable.write"]
 create_records = ["airtable.write"]
 get_base_schema = ["airtable.read"]
+list_tables = ["airtable.read"]
+get_table = ["airtable.read"]
+list_fields = ["airtable.read"]
 replace_record = ["airtable.write"]
 list_records = ["airtable.read"]
 get_record = ["airtable.read"]
